title: Light Tech Chrome Nav Footer
implementationSurface: Token-first visual layer with nav background rendering fix

included: NavBar background shorthand needed for gradient token rendering
excluded: layout, spacing, sizing, routing, props, store, or persistence changes

assumptions: The request targets the existing light mode theme.
Color, gradient, shadow, border, opacity, and glow changes are allowed.
Navigation and footer dimensions remain unchanged.
risks: Dark chrome surfaces can reduce contrast if text tokens are left in the old light palette.
macOS platform overrides can flatten the nav back to plain white.
Gradient nav tokens require the CSS background shorthand rather than background-color.
